title: Customer Service Agent with Function Calling and Order Management
description: A reference implementation demonstrating function calling patterns with voice agents, including customer information lookup, order history retrieval, appointment scheduling, and graceful conversation termination. Built with Flask and WebSockets, it showcases natural conversation flow with agent filler messages and UI-based debugging logs.

tools.name: customer_lookup
tools.description: Look up customer information by phone number or email

tools.name: order_history
tools.description: Retrieve order history for a customer
